privileged_info_summary: The Brenner Pass is located at approximately 47.00° N latitude and 11.51° E longitude. Its standard elevation is 1,370 meters. The official terrain and elevation data for this region is provided by the Austrian Federal Office of Metrology and Surveying (BEV).
